summary: Comprehensive testing of CloseLoop B2B SaaS platform with Supabase Auth migration. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend flows verified including role-based access control, Platform page for superusers, Admin section for superadmins, Settings page with notification toggles, and Call Review page with all 4 sections (email, docs, CRM with notes, tasks). Approval workflow working correctly.

issues: Minor: Sidebar shows 'Client Workspaces' as navigation item instead of just active state indicator

backend: Superuser login via Supabase (superadmin@closeloop.io) - returns Supabase JWT token
Client admin login (sarah@technova.io) - role=superadmin, has workspace_id
Signup creates user via Supabase admin API + MongoDB profile
GET /auth/me returns user profile from MongoDB
GET /platform/workspaces (superuser only) - returns list with member_count, call_count
POST /platform/workspaces creates workspace + admin user via Supabase
POST /platform/superusers creates new superuser via Supabase
GET /admin/team returns team members for workspace
POST /admin/team/invite sends invite email via Resend
POST /calls creates call with AI outputs when transcript provided
GET /calls/{id} returns full call details with AI outputs
POST /calls/{id}/approve-all approves all items and sets status to 'sent'
frontend: Landing page loads with clean marketing design
Sign in button navigates to login page
Login with superuser credentials redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows 'Platform' section for superuser role
Platform page displays: Client Workspaces, Superusers tab, Platform Stats tab
Platform Stats shows workspaces count, users count, calls count
Create Workspace button and form available on Platform page
Login with client admin (superadmin role) works
Dashboard shows 'Admin' section with Data Vault and Team links for superadmin
Platform link correctly hidden for non-superuser users
Settings page loads with Account, Notifications, Integrations tabs
Notification toggles work and save to backend
Calls page loads with Upload Call button
Upload Call modal has: Call Title, Contact Name, Company, Role, Transcript fields
Call creation with transcript processes AI outputs
Call Review page displays all 4 sections: Email, Documents, CRM, Tasks
Call Review shows Summary, Key Moments, full Transcript
CRM section shows Deal Stage, Next Step, Notes, expandable Call Insights
Post-Call Tasks section shows tasks with priority badges and due dates
Individual Edit and Approve buttons work for email and CRM
Approve & Send All button approves all items and shows success toast

auth_migration_verification.supabase_auth: WORKING - Login returns Supabase JWT tokens verified via supabase_admin.auth.get_user(token)
auth_migration_verification.mongodb_profile: WORKING - User profiles stored in MongoDB with supabase_id reference

role_hierarchy.superuser: Platform admin - has no workspace_id, can access /platform/* routes
role_hierarchy.superadmin: Company admin - has workspace_id, can access /admin/* routes
role_hierarchy.rep: Sales rep - has workspace_id, basic access only

protected_routes.admin_only: GET/POST /admin/* - requires superadmin or superuser role

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: CRM integration (HubSpot) - simulated, no actual HubSpot API calls
MOCKED: Transcription service - manual paste only, no automatic transcription
REAL: Email sending via Resend - uses onboarding@resend.dev sender (test mode)
REAL: AI generation - uses Emergent LLM key with Gemini 3 Flash model
seed_data_creation: Multiple test workspaces created during testing. Test calls cleaned up via cleanup test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major auth migration from JWT to Supabase is complete and working. All users now authenticate via Supabase, and user profiles are stored in MongoDB with supabase_id reference. Role hierarchy: superuser (platform admin) > superadmin (company admin) > rep. Platform routes (/platform/*) are superuser-only. Admin routes (/admin/*) require superadmin or superuser. Email sending via Resend is REAL. CRM integration (HubSpot) is still MOCKED. Transcription is manual paste.

additional_notes.supabase_integration: Supabase is used for authentication only. User profiles and all app data stored in MongoDB.
additional_notes.resend_email: Email sending is REAL via Resend API. Sends from onboarding@resend.dev in test mode - may go to spam.
additional_notes.ai_generation: Uses Emergent LLM key with Gemini 3 Flash. Falls back to mock outputs if AI call fails.
